mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: Randomization prevents bias in experimental results

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: Blocks are groups of experimental units with similar characteristics.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: Each block is designed to have equal probability of containing any treatment

mnemonics.title: Key Point 4
mnemonics.content: Each experimental unit is only used once in each block

mnemonics.title: Key Point 5
mnemonics.content: Time of measurement, environmental factors, and other external factors are considered in block design
